name: MadGapun/PBP
description: AI-powered MCP server for job application management in the German-speaking market (DACH). 73 tools, 18 guided workflows, 18 job portal scrapers, React dashboard with 8 tabs, email integration (.msg/.eml), calendar with .ics export, intelligent scoring, and AI coaching. Currently German language only. MIT licensed, runs locally, privacy-first.
